name: chain_i_got_paid_25k_to_build_an_ai_ad_system
method:
I Got Paid $25k to Build an AI Ad System with Claude Code So I may have cracked ads with AI...

I like to talk about my journey as an AI business owner who builds AI solutions for medium sized compani

stages.task: Scrape BuiltWith for Shopify Plus stores + Facebook Ad Library for brands running 50+ active ad creatives (proxy for 5-figure spend)

Score by: ad creative count, store revenue tier (SimilarWeb/traffic estimates), tech stack complexity, whether they use Klaviyo/Attentive (signals sophisticated marketing ops willing to pay for AI tooling)
For top 5 prospects: pull their current top ad creative, generate 3 AI-duplicated variations using Claude as proof-of-concept demo. Package as PDF pitch deck.
Cold email founder/CMO with demo deck attached. Subject: 'I rebuilt your top 3 ads with AI in 10 minutes — here's the output'. Route through existing cold outbound pipeline.
